# Task: Test Valid Task

## Description

Write a simple function that adds two numbers and returns the result.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Function exists and is exported
- [ ] Returns correct sum for positive numbers
- [ ] Returns correct sum for negative numbers
- [ ] Unit tests exist and pass

## Setup Commands

```bash
mkdir -p src && npm init -y
```
